Subinterfaces of Message in org.siprop.v2.b2bua
 interface B2BUAControlMessage
          Manager for standard B2BUA.
 interface B2BUAInfo
          This interface holds the packet about a B2BUA.

Uses of Message in org.siprop.v2.core.messge
 

Subinterfaces of Message in org.siprop.v2.core.messge
 interface ControlMessage
          This interface holds the flag which determines operation of the target class.
 interface FlatMessage
          This interface expresses a flat message.
 interface Info
          This interface holds the message about a packet.
 interface MessageContextInfo
          Info for MessageContext.
 interface MessageContextPacket
          Packet for MessageContextImpl.
 interface Packet
          This interface expresses the message transmitted between layers.
 

Classes in org.siprop.v2.core.messge that implement Message
 class AbstractControlMessage
          abstract of ControlMessage.
 class AbstractFlatMessage
          abstract of FlatMessage.
 class AbstractInfo
          Abstract of Info.

          FlatMessage for SIP.
 class MessageContextInfoImpl
          Info for MessageContextImpl.
 class MessageContextPacketImpl
          Packet for MessageContextImpl.
